heroSubtitle: Play the real season, draft the era, or branch into a reimagined universe.

entryModes.label: Play The Real Season
entryModes.description: Step into 2015-16 with historical rosters intact.

entryModes.label: Draft The Era
entryModes.description: Redraft the full 2015-16 player pool into a new fantasy universe.

entryModes.label: Reimagined Season
entryModes.description: Launch a fully reshuffled 2015-16 and play the alternate branch from opening night.
